testcase.name: tc13_MinimumLogoCount

failure.message: Only 0 logo(s) found — expected at least 3 client logos

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Only 0 logo(s) found — expected at least 3 client logos at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
